case_title: PERRY WONG et al VS. YIM TSUN et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT TSUN, YIM
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-13-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-23-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR STEVEN ERNEST ELIAS.
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JUL-21-2003. JUL-07-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, PERRY WONG, VICK LIN SERVED DEC-27-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TSUN, YIM

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, PERRY WONG, VICK LIN AS TO DEFENDANT TSUN, YIM DOES 1 TO 25,INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-23-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-08-2003
ARBITRATOR MARK B ABELSON APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION AUG-01-2003 THROUGH OCT-30-2003.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-01-2003 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR MARK B. ABELSON
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, PERRY WONG, VICK LIN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 HOURS
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE JUL-31-2003.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON FEB-13-2004 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. DEC-01-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, PERRY WONG, VICK LIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSUN, YIM PLAINTIFF PERRY WONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSUN YIM IN THE AMOUNT OF $650.00 AND PLAINTIFF VICK LIN WONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TSUN YIM THE AMOUNT OF $650.00 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, PERRY WONG, VICK LIN AS TO DEFENDANT TSUN, YIM
